Who I Am

Nutrition is not one-size-fits-all

Olga Hamilton has been practising nutritional therapy since 2012, working with clients presenting some of the most complex chronic health challenges — from longstanding digestive dysfunction to hormone imbalance, skin conditions, and mental health through the gut-brain axis.

Her approach combines advanced functional testing with evidence-based clinical protocols, building programmes that are genuinely individualised to each person's biology, genetics, and lifestyle.

Biography

Olga Hamilton

Olga Hamilton is a registered nutritional therapist and functional medicine practitioner based at 10 Harley Street, London. With a degree from the Institute for Optimum Nutrition and a post-graduate diploma in Nutritional Medicine, she is one of a small number of practitioners in the UK able to analyse complex biological data and translate it into highly personalised clinical programmes.

She passionately believes in the power of nutrition to address every dimension of health — from longstanding digestive dysfunction and gut dysbiosis, to hormone imbalance, skin conditions, weight management, and mental wellbeing through the gut-brain axis.

In 2019, Olga delivered a TEDx talk titled "The Fast Way to Happy", presenting the latest research on how the gut microbiome influences mood, behaviour, and mental health. The talk reflects her commitment to translating complex science into compelling, accessible knowledge.

Alongside her clinical work, Olga serves as scientific spokesperson for Gold Collagen, speaks at industry conferences and exhibitions, and has delivered corporate wellness programmes for major financial institutions.

IBS, SIBO & Gut Health
Consultations

Root-cause, functional medicine approach to digestive dysfunction — using advanced testing to personalise every treatment plan.

Conditions Supported

Is this you?

Olga works with clients presenting a wide range of digestive and gut-related conditions. Rather than treating symptoms in isolation, she investigates and addresses the underlying drivers.

IBS — Irritable Bowel Syndrome
SIBO — Hydrogen & Methane types
H2S-SIBO (Hydrogen Sulphide)
IMO — Intestinal Methanogen Overgrowth
Leaky Gut / Intestinal Permeability
Gut Dysbiosis & ETBF
Candida & Yeast Overgrowth
Low sIgA / Immune Dysfunction
Bloating & Abdominal Pain
Constipation & Diarrhoea
Rosacea & Skin-Gut Conditions
Gut-Brain Axis & Mental Health

The Approach

How Olga works

1
In-Depth Intake & History

A thorough initial consultation exploring symptom history, diet, lifestyle, stress, previous diagnoses, and medical history — the foundation of a truly personalised plan.

2
Advanced Functional Testing

SIBO breath testing, Microba or GI-MAP stool analysis, DUTCH hormone panels, organic acids, genetic testing, and targeted blood work — selected individually based on your presentation.

3
Root Cause Identification

Results are interpreted in context — looking for patterns, identifying the hierarchy of imbalances, and distinguishing primary drivers from secondary effects.

4
Personalised Treatment Programme

A multi-phase protocol delivered in writing — covering diet, supplements, lifestyle, and where appropriate, GP referrals for pharmaceutical support such as rifaximin.

5
Ongoing Review & Adaptation

Regular follow-ups to track progress, review symptom trackers, adjust the protocol, and retest where needed — until resolution is achieved and maintained.

Educational Content

Digestive Health Webinar Series

Watch Olga's digestive health webinar series — designed to demystify the science of gut health, SIBO, and digestion for patients and practitioners alike.

The Secrets to Great Digestion — Part 1

Fixing digestion is the 'holy grail' of health. Part 1 explores how digestive health connects to seemingly unrelated conditions — from allergies to mental health.

The Secrets to Great Digestion — Part 2

Part 2 continues the deep-dive into digestive health science — covering testing, protocols, and the tools Olga uses in clinical practice.

More from Olga

Metabolism & Weight Webinar Series

Olga's two-part webinar series on metabolism and weight management — exploring the science behind why diets fail, and how to work with your biology to achieve lasting results.

Metabolism Webinar — Part 1

A science-led exploration of metabolic health, why conventional approaches fail, and how functional nutrition offers a different path.

Metabolism Webinar — Part 2

Olga continues the metabolic deep-dive, covering nutrition strategies, testing, and the personalised approaches that actually produce lasting change.

Advanced Functional Testing

Know your biology.
Change your health.

Olga uses an extensive toolkit of advanced functional tests to build a complete, personalised picture of your health — then designs targeted protocols to correct what's out of balance.

Testing Portfolio

Tests Olga uses

🦠
Microba Gut Microbiome Analysis

The most advanced stool microbiome sequencing available in the UK. Provides deep metagenomic profiling of bacterial species, functional capacity, and metabolite production — far beyond standard culture-based tests.

MicrobaMetagenomicsDysbiosissIgA
🧫
GI-MAP Stool Analysis

Quantitative PCR-based stool testing measuring pathogens, bacteria, yeasts, parasites, inflammatory markers, and intestinal health markers — a key tool for gut dysfunction investigations.

GI-MAPH. pyloriParasitesCandida
🧬
LifeCodeGX — DNA Methylation Report

A comprehensive genetic report examining methylation pathways, neurotransmitter metabolism, detoxification capacity, and nutrient processing — used to tailor supplementation and diet at the genomic level.

LifeCodeGXMTHFREpigenetics
🔬
LifeCodeGX — DNA Detoxification Report

Genetic mapping of phase I, II, and III detoxification enzymes — identifying polymorphisms that affect oestrogen metabolism, toxin clearance, and medication response.

CYP enzymesOestrogenPhase II detox
⚗️
DUTCH Complete — Hormone Testing

The gold standard in comprehensive hormone assessment — measuring sex hormones, adrenal function, cortisol rhythm, and oestrogen metabolites using dried urine. Essential for perimenopause, PCOS, and hormone-related conditions.

DUTCHOestrogenCortisolPerimenopause
💨
SIBO Breath Testing

Lactulose and glucose breath tests detecting hydrogen, methane, and hydrogen sulphide gas production — the primary diagnostic tool for SIBO and IMO, interpreted alongside clinical presentation.

H2MethaneH2SLactulose
⚡
Organic Acids Test (OAT)

A urinary metabolic snapshot covering mitochondrial function, neurotransmitter metabolism, yeast and bacterial overgrowth markers, nutrient cofactor status, and detoxification capacity.

OATMitochondriaYeastNeurotransmitters
🩸
Comprehensive Blood Panels

Targeted blood work including full blood count, thyroid panel, iron studies, vitamin D, B12, homocysteine, fasting glucose, HbA1c, liver function, and inflammation markers.

FerritinThyroidB12Vitamin D

Corporate Wellbeing Services

🎤
Keynote Talks

Science-backed keynotes on gut health, nutrition, energy management, stress and the microbiome — tailored to your audience and delivered with clarity and impact.

📊
Wellbeing Programmes

Bespoke, ongoing wellness programmes addressing specific company health objectives — from reducing gut-related absence to improving team energy and mental clarity.

🔬
Employee Health Screening

Individual health assessments and brief consultations for employees — helping your team understand their personal health data and make targeted nutrition changes.

TEDx Talk · 2019

The Fast Way to Happy

In 2019, Olga delivered a TEDx talk presenting the latest scientific research on how nutrition affects mental health — and how the gut microbiome influences how we feel and behave. The talk reflects Olga's ability to translate complex science into compelling, accessible communication.

This is why organisations choose Olga as a keynote speaker — genuine scientific credibility and clinical experience combined with the rare ability to captivate an audience on topics that matter to people's daily lives.

Brand Partnerships · Scientific Spokesperson · Ambassador

Where clinical credibility
meets content

Olga brings evidence-based expertise and scientific authority to brand partnerships — not follower counts, but trust, credibility, and clinical authenticity.

The Science-First Spokesperson

Why brands choose Olga

In an era of saturated influencer marketing, brands in the health and supplement space increasingly need credibility — not just reach. Olga is not a classic influencer. She is a clinically registered practitioner, TEDx speaker, and functional medicine expert who communicates complex science clearly and convincingly.

When Olga speaks about a product, she speaks from the clinic and the research literature. Her audiences — both clinical professionals and health-conscious consumers — trust her recommendations because they know she only endorses what she understands scientifically and uses clinically.

Classic Influencer
Large follower count, low expertise depth
Content driven by aesthetics and reach
Generic endorsements with little evidence base
Audiences follow lifestyle, not expertise
Short-term impact on brand perception
Olga Hamilton
Registered clinician — mBANT, CNHC, MSc, TEDx
Content grounded in published science and clinical trials
Only endorses products she understands and uses clinically
Trusted by health professionals and discerning consumers
Provides long-term credibility and scientific authority

Services for Brands

What a partnership looks like

📸
Social Media Content

Instagram video and static content combining product education with clinical science — explaining mechanism, ingredients, and evidence in an engaging format.

🎤
Conference & Exhibition Speaking

Representing brands at industry conferences and trade exhibitions, presenting the science behind the product to professional and consumer audiences.

📰
Press & Media Spokesperson

Media interviews, journalist quotes, and press statements providing clinical credibility and scientific context for brand PR and media campaigns.

📋
Scientific Content

Copy, educational content, and product explainers developed with clinical accuracy — for brand websites, packaging, and marketing collateral.

🎬
Video Production

Filmed branded content for social media, YouTube, and websites — bringing the science of your product to life through clear, credible storytelling.

🤝
Long-term Ambassadorship

Ongoing partnership as scientific face of a brand — attending events, creating content, and acting as credible spokesperson throughout the year.

Case Study in Partnership

Gold Collagen®

Scientific Spokesperson & Ambassador

Science as the strategy

Gold Collagen is the UK's leading clinically-backed liquid collagen supplement brand. Olga serves as their scientific spokesperson and brand ambassador — bringing clinical nutritional expertise and registered practitioner credibility to their positioning in the health and beauty supplement market.

Rather than celebrity endorsement, Gold Collagen chose Olga specifically for her scientific authority — to communicate the clinical evidence behind collagen supplementation in a way that resonates with both professionals and discerning consumers.

500K+
Views on debut Instagram video
CCR
London 2025 Exhibition — represented Gold Collagen

Exhibition & Speaking — Gold Collagen Events

Science on stage

Olga presents the science behind Gold Collagen at trade exhibitions and consumer events — speaking to packed audiences on collagen biology, hydrolysis, bioavailability, and the evidence base for skin, hair, joint, and gut benefits.
